requirement_topic.en: Energy efficiency and energy-labeling — MINEM requirements for refrigerators in scope
requirement_topic.zh: 能效与能效标签——MINEM对相关冰箱型号要求
requirement_topic.zht: 能效與能效標籤——MINEM對相關冰箱型號要求

summary.en: Peru applies an energy-efficiency labeling scheme for relevant household products under MINEM. Imported refrigerators in scope require test evidence against Peru methodology, model-level energy index values in the Peruvian format, and mandatory Spanish labeling where the national rule applies. Energy data may be re-used from China only if methodology compatibility is demonstrated.
summary.zh: 秘鲁对适用家用产品适用MINEM能效标签制度。进口冰箱若在适用范围内需按秘鲁方法提供检测依据、秘鲁格式的能效指标和西班牙语标识，不能默认沿用中国数据。仅当方法等同性可证明时，才可复用中国数据。
summary.zht: 秘魯對適用家用產品適用MINEM能效標籤制度。進口冰箱若在適用範圍內需按秘魯方法提供檢測依據、秘魯格式的能效指標和西班牙語標識，不能默認沿用中國資料。僅當方法等同性可證明時，才可複用中國資料。

standards_or_laws: MINEM energy-labelling program for targeted appliances
Peru technical norms adopted via INACAL and PRODUCE for refrigeration equipment in scope
Producer and importer documentation requirements for model-level Spanish labelling

summary.en: China uses GB 12021.2-2015 and the China Energy Label framework for domestic sale. The Chinese class and label system is mandatory in China, but it is not a direct compliance equivalence for Peru placement, because test method, reporting format, and threshold interpretation differ.
summary.zh: 中国对国内销售使用GB 12021.2-2015及中国能效标签制度。中国能效等级和标签体系在中国具有强制性，但并非秘鲁投放市场的直接等效依据，因测试方法、报告格式和门槛解释不同。
summary.zht: 中國對國內銷售使用GB 12021.2-2015及中國能效標籤制度。中國能效等級和標籤體系在中國具有強制性，但並非秘魯投放市場的直接等效依據，因測試方法、報告格式和門檻解釋不同。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators

gap.en: The practical gap is methodology and declaration scope: Chinese energy class is not directly mapped to Peru labelling classes without remeasurement or accepted conversion. Exporters should recalculate or test to Peru-required methodology and align manuals and label fields before customs and post-clearance audits.
gap.zh: 实际差距在于方法和申报范围：中国能效等级不能直接映射为秘鲁标签等级，除非重新测量或有可核验的转换依据。出口商需按秘鲁方法重新计算或检测，并在文件、说明书和标签字段中按秘鲁要求统一。
gap.zht: 實際差距在於方法和申報範圍：中國能效等級不能直接映射為秘魯標籤等級，除非重新測量或有可核驗的轉換依據。出口商需按秘魯方法重新計算或檢測，並在文件、說明書和標籤欄位中按秘魯要求統一。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the product falls under Peru energy-label scope; model evidence and Spanish labeling are required before market placement
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory in China under GB 12021.2 and China Energy Label for domestic sales; scope does not transfer automatically to Peru

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Energy class and label obligations are Peru-specific. Chinese GB 12021.2 and CCC energy labeling help internal quality checks but do not replace Peru evidence requirements for in-scope refrigerators.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 能效等级与标签要求具备秘鲁特定属性。中国GB 12021.2和中国能效标签可用于内部质量核对，但不能替代秘鲁范围内冰箱的合规证据要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 能效等級與標籤要求具有秘魯特定屬性。中國GB 12021.2與中國能效標籤可用於內部質量核對，但不能替代秘魯範圍內冰箱的合規證據要求。

requirement_topic.en: Horizontal eco-hazard and noise regimes — No direct EU-style substitute
requirement_topic.zh: 横向环保与噪声制度——无欧盟式对应体系
requirement_topic.zht: 橫向環保與噪聲制度——無歐盟式對應體系

summary.en: Peru's refrigerator compliance in this lane is primarily technical-regulation specific. There is no Peruvian regime equivalent to EU-wide RoHS-style substance bans, no blanket EU-style battery chemistry register requirement for refrigerators, and no separate EU-style outdoor-noise gate for standard indoor appliances in this compliance lane.
summary.zh: 本线路径下，秘鲁冰箱合规为按技术规章分项执行。秘鲁没有等同于欧盟范围性RoHS式禁限用制度，也没有针对冰箱适用的欧盟式按化学体系电池注册要求，也没有单独针对普通室内冰箱的欧盟式户外噪声门槛。
summary.zht: 本路徑下，秘魯冰箱合規為按技術規章分項執行。秘魯沒有等同於歐盟範圍性RoHS式禁限用制度，也沒有針對冰箱適用的歐盟式按化學體系電池註冊要求，也沒有單獨針對普通室內冰箱的歐盟式戶外噪音門檻。

standards_or_laws: INACAL and PRODUCE technical regulation framework applied by product category
INDECOPI consumer information and market surveillance rules

summary.en: China maintains multiple environmental and electrical product systems, including CCC and China Energy Label, but these are independent from Peru's category-by-category technical clearances. For this lane, China has no direct regulatory export mirror for an EU-style horizontal RoHS or outdoor-noise compliance gate.
summary.zh: 中国有多套环境与电气产品体系，包括CCC和中国能效标签，但它们与秘鲁按类别技术准入是独立的。该线路径下，中国也不存在与秘鲁对等的欧盟式横向RoHS或户外噪声硬性门槛体系。
summary.zht: 中國有多套環境與電氣產品體系，包括CCC和中國能效標籤，但它們與秘魯按類別技術准入是獨立的。該路徑下，中國也不存在與秘魯對等的歐盟式橫向RoHS或戶外噪聲硬性門檻體系。

standards_or_laws: No direct China-to-Peru bilateral equivalence for EU-style horizontal hazards/noise frameworks

gap.en: Do not transfer EU-style assumptions. Exporters should avoid relying on any perceived RoHS-like or battery-hazard analogue in Peru unless a specific Peruvian law or technical norm explicitly requires it. For refrigerators, focus should remain on Peru-specific NTP adoption, MINEM labeling scope, and importer-led clearance.
gap.zh: 不要沿用欧盟式假设。除非秘鲁法规或技术规章明确要求，出口商不应基于“类RoHS”或“电池危害注册”来替代秘鲁要求。对冰箱而言，应聚焦于秘鲁特定的NTP引入、MINEM能效标签范围以及进口商主导放行。
gap.zht: 不要沿用歐盟式假設。除非秘魯法規或技術規章明確要求，出口商不應基於“類RoHS”或“電池危害註冊”來替代秘魯要求。對冰箱而言，應聚焦於秘魯特定的NTP引入、MINEM能效標籤範圍以及進口商主導放行。

mandatory_status.target: Informational in this lane — no separate mandatory Peru-wide horizontal RoHS/battery-noise regime for typical refrigerators; mandatory items remain scope-specific
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent cross-regime in China for Peruvian import substitution of EU-style horizontal frameworks

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The high-value gap is not a hidden RoHS-style restriction for refrigerators. For this lane, the key compliance path is Peru technical-regulation scope and market-entry documentation, plus MINEM labeling where applicable.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 主要差距不在于欧盟式RoHS隐性限制。对于该线路径，关键合规路径是是否落入秘鲁技术规章范围以及相应进口文件和适用情况下的MINEM标签。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 主要差距不在於歐盟式RoHS隱性限制。對於該路徑，關鍵合規路徑是是否落入秘魯技術規章範圍以及相應進口文件和適用情況下的MINEM標籤。
